posts.title: Introducing the View Library: 40 frontend views, ready to compile
posts.excerpt: We just shipped the largest update to project-to-any since launch. Here's what's in the view library and how to use it.

posts.title: Material Design 3 tokens in SuperCSS: how we fetched and mapped them
posts.excerpt: MD3 ships its tokens in JS modules, not CSS files. Here's how we extracted them from the CDN and mapped them to --sc-* variables.

posts.title: Why we describe views in JSON, not code
posts.excerpt: The project-to-any compiler is built on a simple idea: intent should be separate from implementation. Here's why that matters.

posts.title: Attribute-driven CSS: building themes without JavaScript
posts.excerpt: data-theme, data-palette, data-mode — switching the entire look of an app with one HTML attribute and pure CSS.

posts.title: Building a full MEAN stack app in 20 minutes with Acme Studio
posts.excerpt: Angular 17, Express 4, MongoDB — connected and running. Follow along and you'll have a working stack before your coffee cools.
